metadata.description: Acuris developer plugins for AI coding agents — Claude Code, Cursor, and any client that consumes Anthropic Agent Skills.

plugins.name: acuris-address
plugins.description: Acuris Address Validation & Geocoding APIs — autocomplete, validation, forward/reverse geocoding, and migrations from libAddressDoctor, Loqate, Experian QAS, Melissa, and Smarty.
